title: MinIcons
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab5d8aafb416397ce6a20bfecc8f84bd053c157d.png)
### MinIcons
Adds icons to enchanted books, full language support.
### Updates

The resource pack will be updated to the latest versions of Minecraft.

[![donate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adca3088c3d2dd4353fce413afd87fab80dbbdda.png)](https://ko-fi.com/nederliver)
